title: Settings
description: Manage your application settings and preferences.

labor.title: Labor Law Rules
labor.description: Configure work hour limits and break requirements

country_region.title: Country/Region
country_region.info2: Rules will be applied to all shift validations

max_hours_per_day.label: Maximum Hours Per Day
max_hours_per_day.description: Maximum work hours allowed per day

min_rest_between_shifts.label: Minimum Rest Between Shifts (hours)
min_rest_between_shifts.description: Minimum rest time required between shifts

min_break_duration.label: Minimum Break Duration (minutes)
min_break_duration.description: Required break duration for long shifts

long_shift_threshold.label: Long Shift Threshold (hours)
long_shift_threshold.description: Hours that trigger mandatory break requirement

toast.settings_saved: Settings Saved: Labor law rules have been updated successfully.
toast.error_save: Error: Failed to save labor law settings.
toast.reset_complete: Reset Complete: Labor law rules have been reset to Norwegian defaults (Arbeidsmiljøloven).

access_setting.title: Punch Clock Access
access_setting.description: Configure where employees can punch in and out.

access_restrictions.title: Access Restrictions
access_restrictions.description: Enable employees to punch-in and out of a shift from the device.

anywhere.label: Anywhere
anywhere.description: Employees can punch in/out from any location

specific_locations.label: Specific locations
specific_locations.description: Restrict punch in/out to predefined locations

department_access.title: Department Access
department_access.description: Control which departments can use the punch clock system.

all_departments.label: All departments
all_departments.description: Allow all departments to use punch clock

specific_departments.label: Specific departments
specific_departments.description: Restrict punch clock access to selected departments

specific_departments.title: Allowed Departments
specific_departments.empty_message: No departments selected. Employees won’t be able to access punch clock.
specific_departments.tooltip: Select departments allowed to use the punch clock system.

allowed_locations.title: Allowed Locations
allowed_locations.description: Add locations where employees can punch in/out.
allowed_locations.empty_message: No locations configured. Employees won't be able to punch in/out until you add at least one location.
allowed_locations.no_departments_warning: No departments selected. Employees won't be able to access punch clock.

add_form.title: Add New Location
add_form.radius_hint: Employees must be within this distance to punch in/out
add_form.departments_hint: Select which departments can punch in from this location. Leave empty for all departments.

toast.saved_success: Punch clock access settings saved successfully.
toast.error_save: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

general_setting.title: Punch Clock - General
general_setting.coming_soon: This punch clock feature is coming soon.

profile_setting.title: Punch Clock Profiles
profile_setting.description: Manage time tracking profiles for different departments and work schedules.
profile_setting.no_profiles_description: Create your first punch clock profile to get started

modal.active_profile_hint: Profile will be available for use when active

fields.active_profile_hint: Profile will be available for use when active

toast.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
toast.delete_error: Failed to delete profile. Please try again.
toast.code_generated:
New activation code generated: {{code}}

This code can be used to activate this punch clock profile.
toast.code_error: Failed to generate activation code. Please try again.

advance_setting.title: Punch Clock - Advance
advance_setting.coming_soon: This punch clock feature is coming soon.

general_setting.title: People - General
general_setting.description: Configure global employee management settings that apply across your organization.

required_fields.title: Required Profile Fields
required_fields.description: Define which fields are mandatory for all employees.

defaults.title: Default Settings for New Employees
defaults.description: Set default values applied when creating new employees.

visibility.title: Visibility & Access Rules
visibility.description: Control how employees can view other employees' information.
visibility.roles_can_view: Roles that can view all employees
visibility.roles_hint: Select which roles can view the full employee list
visibility.see_contact_info: Employees can see colleague contact info
visibility.see_contact_info_hint: Allow employees to view contact details of their colleagues
visibility.limit_by_department_hint: Employees can only see colleagues in their own department

onboarding.title: Employee Onboarding Rules
onboarding.description: Configure requirements for new employee activation.
onboarding.required_before_active: Required fields before employee becomes active
onboarding.manager_approval_hint: New employees need manager approval before becoming active
onboarding.send_reminder_hint: Automatically remind employees to complete their profile
onboarding.reminder_days: Days after hire to send reminder

preferences.title: General HR Preferences
preferences.notifications_hint: Allow employees to receive system notifications
preferences.can_edit_profile: Employees can edit their own profile
preferences.can_edit_profile_hint: Allow employees to update their personal information

messages.error: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

contract_rules_setting.title: People - Contract Rules
contract_rules_setting.coming_soon: This punch clock feature is coming soon.

contract_setup_setting.title: Create Contract Template
contract_setup_setting.description: Create reusable contract templates for different employee groups
contract_setup_setting.contract_body_placeholder: Enter the contract content here. You can use variables like {{employee_name}}, {{start_date}}, {{salary}}, etc.
contract_setup_setting.variables_hint: Use variables in double curly braces like {{employee_name}}, {{start_date}}, {{department}} to automatically fill employee data

page.title: My Profile
page.description: Manage your personal information and account settings.

edit_profile_page.title: Edit Profile
edit_profile_page.description: Update your personal information and account settings.

page.title: Business Information
page.description: Manage your company details and currency preferences

form.currency_hint: This currency will be used for all payroll, salary, and financial calculations.

messages.error: An error occurred while updating the business information.

validation.min_length: This field must have at least {{min}} characters.

menu.title: Shift Types
menu.description: Configure shift types and pay calculations

labor_law_profiles.title: Labor Law Profiles
labor_law_profiles.description: Create named profiles that link to specific labor law rules
labor_law_profiles.name: Name
labor_law_profiles.no_profiles: No labor law profiles defined yet
labor_law_profiles.no_profiles_hint: Create profiles to link labor law rules with contract types
labor_law_profiles.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
labor_law_profiles.cannot_delete_linked: This profile is linked to contract types. Please remove those links first.

contract_rules.title: Contract Rules
contract_rules.description: Define contract types with specific employment conditions and limits
contract_rules.create_profile_first: Please create a Labor Law Profile first before adding contract types.
contract_rules.name: Name
contract_rules.roles_exempt_hint: Select roles that are exempt from overtime calculations
contract_rules.leave_empty_legal_min: Leave empty to use legal minimum
contract_rules.no_contract_types_hint: Create contract types to define employment conditions for your employees
contract_rules.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

location_picker.title: Select Location
location_picker.subtitle: Search for a location or click on the map
